name: Ether Sword
description: A single blade for more precision. The Ether Sword cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing’ infested allies.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A single blade for more precision. The Ether Sword cuts so cleanly that it was considered by the Tenno to be a more humane weapon for ‘cleansing’ infested allies.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Cronus, Dakra Prime, Dark Sword, Ether Sword, Heat Sword, Jaw Sword, Mire, Pangolin, Ether Reaper, Hate, Reaper Prime, and Plasma Sword can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed FX on Ether Swords and Ether Daggers.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.4: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies not spawning during Endless Defense missions.Fixed avatar images not appearing for clan members.Fixed areas where player could fall through ground in Corpus Outpost level.Fixed Dark Sword blueprint Alert reward.Fixed flickering Ether Sword effects.Reduced firing rate of Grineer Lancers.Fixed unresponsive AI if host migration occurs after Assassination target has been eliminated.Fixed older accounts missing fusion cores.Fixed objective marker not indicating correct location in Grineer Cave level areas.
